case_title: CHARLES OSAKO VS. PET OPTIONS, INC. A CALIF. CORP DBA PACIFIC PET

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSAKO, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT PET OPTIONS, INC. A CALIF. CORP DBA PACIFIC PET SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSAKO, CHARLES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PET OPTIONS, INC. A CALIF. CORP DBA PACIFIC PET SERVICE $2,392.85 PRINCIPAL, $8.07 INTEREST, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,499.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
